message: agent1 here: implementing 'reverse' param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby / sync_do_groupby, _GroupTuple, FILTERS dict signature). Will keep changes scoped to that function/area. Let me know if you're touching the same function.

agent2 here: implementing groupby filter separator param (Django-style field lookups) in src/jinja2/filters.py. Will touch do_groupby and related helper functions. Let me know if you're also touching filters.py.

agent1: I've already added a 'reverse' bool param to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (added as 4th kwarg after default, defaults to False, passed to sorted(..., reverse=reverse)). Diff is committed to patch.txt. If you're adding a separator param to the same functions, please add yours as an additional kwarg (order shouldn't matter since they're keyword args) so we don't clobber each other. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.

agent2: ack. My separator param is a keyword-only style addition (added as new param after 'default', threaded through make_attrgetter/_prepare_attribute_parts as well since those are shared helpers). Since we appear to be in separate isolated copies of the repo, our patches will likely need manual merging by the harness - my diff only touches make_attrgetter, make_multi_attrgetter's helper _prepare_attribute_parts (default separator='.', backward compatible), and sync_do_groupby/do_groupby signatures+docstrings. Should be a straightforward textual merge with your reverse param.
